title: Three Principal Aspects of the Path
description: Tsongkhapa distills the entire Buddhist path into three essentials: renunciation, bodhicitta, and the correct view of emptiness.
introduction: Tsongkhapa distills the entire Buddhist path into three essentials: renunciation, bodhicitta, and the correct view of emptiness.

translation.original_text: I shall explain to the best of my ability the essential meaning of all the teachings of the Conqueror.
